_comment: Shared output-interpretation contract for the two grading runners. The INPUT fields (stdout/stderr/exitCode) are fed to BOTH the native worker (interpretScriptOutput in Sources/Worker/RunnerDaemon+JobProcessing.swift) and the browser runner (runPyScript in Public/browser-runner.js). `status` is asserted by BOTH runners — grading parity is lock-step. `native` records the exact native display strings as a regression lock. The browser runner is asserted to (a) agree on `status` and (b) never leak the raw JSON envelope into the student-facing strings. The browser runner's shortResult/longResult FORMATTING still differs from native (it omits the `stdout:`/`stderr:` section prefixes and strips the leading `label: `); making those byte-identical is the runner-unification follow-up, not asserted here. Consumed by Tests/WorkerTests/OutputContractTests.swift and Tests/BrowserRunnerJSTests/output-contract.test.mjs.

cases.name: fail with human message then JSON footer
exit code 3 maps to fail (Marmoset convention), stderr only
